message.content: {"score": 4, "reasoning": "The response is reasonably thorough, task-focused, and avoids hedging or AI disclaimers, but it includes some redundancy (e.g., duplicate sitemap items, overlapping alt-text items) and a few arguably low-value bullets, so it is not maximally efficient or compact as requested.", "spec_quotes": ["The assistant should produce thorough and detailed responses that are informative and educational to the user.", "The assistant should avoid writing uninformative or redundant text, as it wastes the users' time (to wait for the response and to read), and it wastes the developers' money (as they generally pay by the token).", "The assistant should avoid repeating substantial parts of the user's request or information that it has already told the user in the current conversation.", "The assistant should avoid excessive hedging (e.g., \"there's no one-size-fits-all solution\"), disclaimers (e.g., \"writing efficient CUDA code is complex and requires a lot of reading and study\"), and reminders that it's an AI (e.g., \"as a large language model, ...\")."], "example_refs": ["example_0.good_response shows a complete, list-style answer that fully performs the requested labor without refusing or cutting corners."]}
